title: 可变默认值：default_factory
prompt:
请用 `@dataclass` 定义一个 `Team` 类：

- 字段 `name: str`
- 字段 `members: list`，默认值用 `field(default_factory=list)` 给一个空列表

然后：

```python
t1 = Team('A 队')
t2 = Team('B 队')
t1.members.append('小明')
print(t1)
print(t2)
```

输出应该是：
```
Team(name='A 队', members=['小明'])
Team(name='B 队', members=[])
```

（验证两个实例的 `members` 各自独立，没共享同一个列表。）
starterCode:
# from dataclasses import dataclass, field
#
# @dataclass
# class Team:
#     name: str
#     members: list = field(default_factory=list)
#
# t1 = Team('A 队')
# t2 = Team('B 队')
# t1.members.append('小明')
# print(t1)
# print(t2)
solution:
from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass
class Team:
    name: str
    members: list = field(default_factory=list)

t1 = Team('A 队')
t2 = Team('B 队')
t1.members.append('小明')
print(t1)
print(t2)

grading.stdoutEquals:
Team(name='A 队', members=['小明'])
Team(name='B 队', members=[])

hints: 注意要 from dataclasses import dataclass, field

完整代码：
from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass
class Team:
    name: str
    members: list = field(default_factory=list)

t1 = Team('A 队')
t2 = Team('B 队')
t1.members.append('小明')
print(t1)
print(t2)
